query:
SELECT 
  u.name,
  u.email,
  COUNT(*) as emails_sent,
  MIN(FROM_UNIXTIME(l.sentAt/1000)) as first_sent,
  MAX(FROM_UNIXTIME(l.sentAt/1000)) as last_sent,
  GROUP_CONCAT(l.digestType ORDER BY l.sentAt) as digest_types
FROM userEmailSendLog l
JOIN users u ON u.id = l.userId
WHERE l.sentAt > UNIX_TIMESTAMP('2026-06-07 20:00:00') * 1000
  AND l.status = 'sent'
GROUP BY u.id, u.name, u.email
ORDER BY emails_sent DESC;
command:

  GROUP_CONCAT(l.digestType ORDER BY l.sentAt) as digest_types
FROM userEmailSendLog l
JOIN users u ON u.id = l.userId
WHERE l.sentAt > UNIX_TIMESTAMP('2026-06-07 20:00:00') * 1000
  AND l.status = 'sent'
GROUP BY u.id, u.name, u.email
ORDER BY emails_sent DESC;
